text:
Once upon a time, there were two frogs living in a quiet pond. These weren't your average frogs—they were adventurous and chatty.

One sunny morning, Froggy said, "Hey Froggy, do you think there are flowers in the meadow beyond the pond?"

Froggy II replied, "I heard whispers of yellow ones that dance in the breeze."

With the sun high in the sky, they decided to set out.

After a pleasant hop along the edges of the pond, they found themselves at the meadow. The flowers were indeed yellow, sparkling under the sunlight. Froggy and Froggy II danced among them, their voices mingling with the sweet songs of the birds.

Then they encountered a babbling brook. Froggy gazed into its crystal-clear waters and said, "These waters tell secrets. Tell me a story, stream."

The brook laughed. "Oh, I am full of tales. But I will tell you a secret. In the deepest part
